projectDescription: Internal operations workspace with authentication, cashout tracking with real-time verification, and company credentials management system.
keyFeatures: Centralized authentication hub with role-based access control
Real-time cashout submission and verification system with Google Sheets sync
Company credentials management with multi-category organization
Statistical dashboards and leaderboards for cashout performance
Team management for supervisors with user creation and role assignment
Master game catalog with dark/light theme support
publicApiSurface: Dashboard view - Main application hub with app cards
Cashouts interface - Submit, review, and track cashouts
Operapedia interface - Manage company credentials and game catalog
Role-based UI - Supervisor, Analista, and Chats roles
Team management - Create and manage user accounts (supervisor only)
Statistics and leaderboard views - Performance tracking and analytics
